courses.metaDescription: Browse Florida driving courses and prep — TLSAE, teen driver education, driver improvement, 55+, permit test prep, and bilingual support.
courses.title: Courses & Prep
courses.subtitle: Regulated courses are delivered through approved providers. Prep products are our own educational materials. Filter by your situation, or use the Course Finder.

courseDetail.leadBody: Tell us a bit about you and we'll help with the next step.

quiz.metaDescription: Answer a few quick questions and get a clear recommendation for the right Florida driving course or package.

contact.metaDescription: Get bilingual help choosing the right Florida driving course. Contact us by form, phone, email, or WhatsApp.
contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Tell us your situation and we'll point you to the right next step — in English or Spanish.

checkout.metaDescription: Review your selection and get started with A&A Driving School.
checkout.title: Review & get started
checkout.note: Secure online payment is coming soon. Request enrollment now and we'll help you complete it — including any steps with the approved provider for regulated courses.
checkout.emptyBody: Browse our courses and packages to choose what fits your situation.

admin.title: Lead dashboard
admin.subtitle: Internal view of captured leads (current server session).
admin.empty: No leads captured yet in this session.
admin.disabledBody: Set the ADMIN_TOKEN environment variable to enable the lead dashboard.
